\documentclass{article}
\title{Main paper}

\begin{document}
\maketitle

\section{Introduction}
This is the actual paper to submit. The fixture also ships a backup file
(\texttt{main\_backup.tex}), a response letter (\texttt{response.tex}),
and a supplement (\texttt{Supplementary\_Materials.tex}) — all containing
\verb|\documentclass|. The auto-detect heuristic should rank
\texttt{main.tex} highest because the filename contains ``main'' and none
of the de-prioritized keywords (response/backup/supplement).

If the heuristic ever regresses and picks the wrong file, this fixture
will catch it on a quick \texttt{--dry-run}.

\end{document}
